overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the player character moving from a dimly lit back corridor through a grimy bathroom and into a vibrant neon-lit nightclub. The clip transitions from cool teal artificial lighting to intense multicolored neon as the player explores the commercial interior spaces.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow service corridor toward a metal door

entered.detail: illuminated vending machine with 'FRIED ANTS' branding and snack displays
wall covered in blue graffiti tags and scribbles
dark metal double doors leading to the bathroom area
yellow cleaning bucket with wringer on the floor

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a narrow, dimly lit service corridor characterized by teal artificial lighting. A prominent 'FRIED ANTS' vending machine stands on the left, while graffiti covers the concrete walls. The player approaches a set of metal doors at the end of the hallway.

events.description: opening metal door and entering the dark bathroom from the corridor
player crouches down to observe the NPC near the bathroom stalls

agents.ego_description: entering the bathroom and cautiously approaching a crouching figure near the stalls

notable_agents.action: crouching near the bathroom stalls wearing a white hoodie and cap

entered.detail: metal door frame leading into the restroom
white ceramic urinals mounted on tiled wall with small red indicator lights
long counter with multiple white basin sinks and faucets
large rectangular mirrors mounted above the sink counter
metal door with vertical slats leading out of the bathroom
illuminated poster showing a muscular figure with text

segments.scene_description: The player enters a grimy public bathroom with white tiled walls covered in graffiti. The space features urinals with red indicator lights, a row of sinks with mirrors, and a crouching NPC near the stalls. The lighting remains dim and teal-toned as the player moves through the space toward the exit door.

events.description: exiting the bathroom into the large open nightclub space
dramatic shift from dim teal lighting to vibrant multicolored neon red, green, and purple

agents.ego_description: walking through the bustling nightclub, observing the bar area and various patrons

notable_agents.action: two figures standing against the striped wall beneath red neon lights

entered.detail: large oval-shaped pink neon light fixture hanging above the bar
curved bar counter illuminated with green neon edge lighting
elevated DJ station with equipment and screens
pink neon heart-shaped sign on the back wall
floating holographic menus and advertisements above the bar

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the bathroom into a vibrant, expansive nightclub bathed in intense neon lighting. A large circular pink neon fixture dominates the ceiling above a green-lit bar counter. The space features a DJ booth, holographic displays, scattered patrons, and a dramatic industrial atmosphere with red and green neon accents throughout.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sterile, dimly lit service area into the sensory overload of a vibrant neon nightclub. It begins in a narrow concrete corridor bathed in cool teal artificial lighting, passing a Fried Ants vending machine and graffiti-covered walls toward a set of metal doors. As the camera pushes through the doors, the environment shifts into a grimy public bathroom with white tiled walls and red indicator lights on the urinals, maintaining the dim teal atmosphere while passing a crouching NPC. The scene then opens abruptly as the player exits the bathroom, transitioning from the claustrophobic utility spaces into an expansive club filled with intense multicolored neon. This final space expands to reveal a large circular pink ceiling fixture and a green-lit bar counter, surrounded by holographic displays and patrons under a dramatic industrial canopy of red and green lights.
